title: ICYMI: the 7 biggest tech stories of the week, from the world's techiest e-bike to Apple vs OpenAI drama
excerpt: The week's biggest tech news from Nokia, Samsung, Sony, and more for July 11, 2026.
content_html:
Every week here at TechRadar we publish a whole host of technology stories — it would be a seriously impressive feat if you managed to keep up with all of them, what with everything else happening going on (was there a World Cup?).

The aim of this ICYMI (In Case You Missed It) round-up is to help you quickly catch up on the biggest stories and the most important headlines in tech. These are the articles that mattered most over the past seven days.

We've got news on Apple, OpenAI, OnePlus, Volkswagen, and Microsoft, as well as a behind-the-scenes look at Samsung and an important GoPro review — so let's dive in.

7. Volkswagen revealed the world's techiest e-bike

Volkswagen has a brand new electric bicycle to show off: the new Smart eBike range has been developed in partnership with n+, and goes big on the tech and the safety features. You'll find radar-assisted traffic monitoring here, as well as a high-definition rear view camera, so while you're pedaling (or not) you'll have a better idea of what's around you.

There's an expanded safety ecosystem too, with an optional smart helmet for syncing turn signals and making them more visible, and a pair of smart glasses that are perhaps the most cutting edge part of the whole package. You can use the smart specs to get journey information and navigation instructions put in front of your eyes when they're needed.

  • Read the full story: Volkswagen unveils its innovative eBike with the world's first integrated rear-view camera and smart glasses

6. We reviewed GoPro’s premium action cam

GoPro is being a little bit more ambitious with its new Mission 1 Pro, a flagship action camera that builds on the classic form factor while adding some premium extras. Our Senior Staff Writer Hamish Hector has been giving the camera a thorough TechRadar test, and came away impressed with just about everything the Mission 1 Pro has to offer.

Special praise was given to the high-resolution video recording, the choice of recording modes, and the tweaked design choices that make the Mission 1 Pro different to its predecessors. Click through to see what the premium camera is capable of in terms of photo and video performance, and to find out whether it's the right upgrade for you.

Sign up for breaking news, reviews, opinion, top tech deals, and more.

  • Read the full story: The Mission 1 Pro isn’t just GoPro's flagship action cam, it’s a fantastic all-round vacation camera with the point-and-shoot grip — I just wish it was cheaper

5. We went inside Samsung Display’s secret labs

Samsung phones and tablets are known for the quality of their screens, so of course we jumped at the chance when we were invited to take a behind-the-scenes tour of a Samsung Display factory. This is where current displays are made and tested, and where next-gen models are tested (though sadly we didn't get to see the Galaxy Z Fold 8).

From advanced stress tests to upcoming displays with optical illusions built in, there was a lot to look at on the tour, reading through our write-up is the next best thing to actually getting access yourself. Of course, we also had to ask Samsung Display representatives about the rumored iPhone Fold, but they didn't seem too worried by the competition...

  • Read the full story: Inside Samsung Display's secret labs, where it builds and stress-tests next-gen displays — and says it's ready for Apple to launch a foldable: 'We mean it, we love other companies to join this market'

4. The iOS 27 public beta landed with the new Siri

The upcoming iOS 27 software update gives iPhone owners a lot to look forward to, not least the new and improved Siri AI app (or Siri 2.0, effectively). This week the public beta dropped, which means that anyone who wants to can try out the new features early — assuming they don't mind putting up with a few bugs or random crashes along the way.

Whether you're a veteran at running betas or thinking about dipping your toe in for the first time, our guide will explain how to download and install iOS 27 on your phone. We've also highlighted three of the new features you should test out first, including the improved photo editing tools that use a bit of AI magic to make your pictures look better than ever.

  • Read the full story: How to download the iOS 27 public beta — and 3 new things to try first

3. Windows 11 got a major update

There have been some missteps along the way, but generally speaking Microsoft is on something of a roll when it comes to improving Windows 11 this year. The latest July update continues that trend, and if you're a user of the desktop operating system then you should be happy: there are some smart new features, and some important bug fixes.

One of the stand-out upgrades this time is a feature we've been waiting a while for: a proper pause function for Windows 11 updates, so if you don't want to install the latest patches right away, you don't feel like you're being pestered to get them applied as soon as possible. We've got details on how the feature works, plus what else is new this time.

  • Read the full story: New Windows 11 update is a big one — these are my top 4 features, including the ability to pause updates indefinitely

2. A bombshell Apple vs OpenAI lawsuit landed

It's fair to say Apple and OpenAI aren't on as good terms as they used to be, what with staff being poached and confidential information being stolen... allegedly. Apple has now filed a lawsuit against OpenAI, claiming that the ChatGPT developer has pinched trade secrets through ex-Apple employees — and the case could have serious long-term repercussions.

Depending on what the courts and judges decide, this could impact OpenAI's nascent plans to launch hardware devices, as well as having an influence on how Apple develops its software — remember that ChatGPT is still embedded in Siri, at the time of writing. We're likely to hear much more about this astonishing case in the months to come.

  • Read the full story: Apple vs OpenAI lawsuit — 8 bombshell accusations and how the legal war might change your next iPhone

1. OnePlus officially quit the US and Europe

OnePlus has finally run out of road — in the US and Europe at least. Parent company Oppo has decided the brand will withdraw from those markets, which means a large part of the world will be missing out on some great handsets. In recent years, some of our favorite phones have come from OnePlus, but availability will be much more limited from now on.

If you already own a OnePlus device in the US or Europe, then you'll continue to get support and software updates, but there won't be any new phone launches. "It wasn't a decision made in a rush," explained Oppo's Shuang Chen in a briefing. "Being a responsible brand means knowing when to go all in and when to make a choice."

  • Read the full story: 'It wasn't a decision made in a rush': OnePlus explains why it’s just quit the US and Europe — and answers our 5 biggest questions about what it means

Follow TechRadar on Google News and add us as a preferred source to get our expert news, reviews, and opinion in your feeds.

Dave is a freelance tech journalist who has been writing about gadgets, apps and the web for more than two decades. Based out of Stockport, England, on TechRadar you'll find him covering news, features and reviews, particularly for phones, tablets and wearables. Working to ensure our breaking news coverage is the best in the business over weekends, David also has bylines at Gizmodo, T3, PopSci and a few other places besides, as well as being many years editing the likes of PC Explorer and The Hardware Handbook.

blocks.html_en: 3. Windows 11 got a major update

sentences.en: Windows 11 got a major update
sentences.zh: Windows 11 有了重大更新

sentences.en: There are upgrades for Windows 11 users to look forward to (Image credit: Surface/Unsplash)
sentences.zh: Windows 11 用户值得期待的升级（图片来源：Surface/Unsplash）

blocks.html_en: There have been some missteps along the way, but generally speaking Microsoft is on something of a roll when it comes to improving Windows 11 this year. The latest July update continues that trend, and if you're a user of the desktop operating system then you should be happy: there are some smart new features, and some important bug fixes.

sentences.en: There have been some missteps along the way, but generally speaking Microsoft is on something of a roll when it comes to improving Windows 11 this year.
sentences.zh: 虽然在此过程中出现了一些失误，但总的来说，微软今年在改进 Windows 11 方面进展顺利。

sentences.en: The latest July update continues that trend, and if you're a user of the desktop operating system then you should be happy: there are some smart new features, and some important bug fixes.
sentences.zh: 最新的 7 月更新延续了这一趋势，如果您是桌面操作系统的用户，那么您应该感到高兴：有一些智能的新功能，以及一些重要的错误修复。

blocks.html_en: One of the stand-out upgrades this time is a feature we've been waiting a while for: a proper pause function for Windows 11 updates, so if you don't want to install the latest patches right away, you don't feel like you're being pestered to get them applied as soon as possible. We've got details on how the feature works, plus what else is new this time.

sentences.en: One of the stand-out upgrades this time is a feature we've been waiting a while for: a proper pause function for Windows 11 updates, so if you don't want to install the latest patches right away, you don't feel like you're being pestered to get them applied as soon as possible.
sentences.zh: 这次最引人注目的升级之一是我们等待已久的功能：Windows 11 更新的适当暂停功能，因此如果您不想立即安装最新补丁，您不会觉得自己被催促尽快应用它们。

sentences.en: We've got details on how the feature works, plus what else is new this time.
sentences.zh: 我们已经了解了该功能如何工作的详细信息，以及这次的其他新内容。

blocks.html_en: • Read the full story: New Windows 11 update is a big one — these are my top 4 features, including the ability to pause updates indefinitely

sentences.en: Read the full story: New Windows 11 update is a big one — these are my top 4 features, including the ability to pause updates indefinitely
sentences.zh: 阅读全文：新的 Windows 11 更新是一项重大更新 - 这是我最喜欢的 4 个功能，包括无限期暂停更新的功能

blocks.html_en: 2. A bombshell Apple vs OpenAI lawsuit landed

sentences.en: A bombshell Apple vs OpenAI lawsuit landed
sentences.zh: 苹果 vs OpenAI 的重磅诉讼落下

sentences.en: It's Tim Cook vs Sam Altman (Image credit: Lance Ulanoff)
sentences.zh: 这是蒂姆·库克 vs 萨姆·奥尔特曼（图片来源：Lance Ulanoff）

blocks.html_en: It's fair to say Apple and OpenAI aren't on as good terms as they used to be, what with staff being poached and confidential information being stolen... allegedly. Apple has now filed a lawsuit against OpenAI, claiming that the ChatGPT developer has pinched trade secrets through ex-Apple employees — and the case could have serious long-term repercussions.

sentences.en: It's fair to say Apple and OpenAI aren't on as good terms as they used to be, what with staff being poached and confidential information being stolen...
sentences.zh: 公平地说，苹果和 OpenAI 的关系不像以前那么好了，员工被挖走，机密信息被盗……

sentences.en: allegedly.
sentences.zh: 据称。

sentences.en: Apple has now filed a lawsuit against OpenAI, claiming that the ChatGPT developer has pinched trade secrets through ex-Apple employees — and the case could have serious long-term repercussions.
sentences.zh: 苹果现已对 OpenAI 提起诉讼，声称 ChatGPT 开发商通过前苹果员工窃取了商业机密，该案可能会产生严重的长期影响。

blocks.html_en: Depending on what the courts and judges decide, this could impact OpenAI's nascent plans to launch hardware devices, as well as having an influence on how Apple develops its software — remember that ChatGPT is still embedded in Siri, at the time of writing. We're likely to hear much more about this astonishing case in the months to come.

sentences.en: Depending on what the courts and judges decide, this could impact OpenAI's nascent plans to launch hardware devices, as well as having an influence on how Apple develops its software — remember that ChatGPT is still embedded in Siri, at the time of writing.
sentences.zh: 根据法院和法官的裁决，这可能会影响 OpenAI 推出硬件设备的新计划，并影响苹果开发其软件的方式——请记住，在撰写本文时，ChatGPT 仍然嵌入在 Siri 中。

sentences.en: We're likely to hear much more about this astonishing case in the months to come.
sentences.zh: 在接下来的几个月里，我们可能会听到更多有关这个令人震惊的案件的消息。

blocks.html_en: • Read the full story: Apple vs OpenAI lawsuit — 8 bombshell accusations and how the legal war might change your next iPhone

sentences.en: Read the full story: Apple vs OpenAI lawsuit — 8 bombshell accusations and how the legal war might change your next iPhone
sentences.zh: 阅读全文：Apple 与 OpenAI 诉讼 — 8 项爆炸性指控以及这场法律战争可能如何改变你的下一部 iPhone

blocks.html_en: 1. OnePlus officially quit the US and Europe

sentences.en: OnePlus officially quit the US and Europe
sentences.zh: OnePlus正式退出美国和欧洲

sentences.en: The OnePlus 15 (Image credit: Future)
sentences.zh: OnePlus 15（图片来源：Future）

blocks.html_en: OnePlus has finally run out of road — in the US and Europe at least. Parent company Oppo has decided the brand will withdraw from those markets, which means a large part of the world will be missing out on some great handsets. In recent years, some of our favorite phones have come from OnePlus, but availability will be much more limited from now on.

sentences.en: OnePlus has finally run out of road — in the US and Europe at least.
sentences.zh: OnePlus 终于没路了——至少在美国和欧洲是这样。

sentences.en: Parent company Oppo has decided the brand will withdraw from those markets, which means a large part of the world will be missing out on some great handsets.
sentences.zh: 母公司 Oppo 已决定该品牌将退出这些市场，这意味着世界上很大一部分地区将错过一些出色的手机。

sentences.en: In recent years, some of our favorite phones have come from OnePlus, but availability will be much more limited from now on.
sentences.zh: 近年来，我们最喜欢的一些手机都来自 OnePlus，但从现在开始，可用性将更加有限。

blocks.html_en: If you already own a OnePlus device in the US or Europe, then you'll continue to get support and software updates, but there won't be any new phone launches. "It wasn't a decision made in a rush," explained Oppo's Shuang Chen in a briefing. "Being a responsible brand means knowing when to go all in and when to make a choice."

sentences.en: If you already own a OnePlus device in the US or Europe, then you'll continue to get support and software updates, but there won't be any new phone launches.
sentences.zh: 如果您已经在美国或欧洲拥有 OnePlus 设备，那么您将继续获得支持和软件更新，但不会发布任何新手机。

sentences.en: "It wasn't a decision made in a rush," explained Oppo's Shuang Chen in a briefing.
sentences.zh: “这并不是一个仓促做出的决定，”Oppo 的陈爽在一份简报中解释道。

sentences.en: "Being a responsible brand means knowing when to go all in and when to make a choice."
sentences.zh: “成为一个负责任的品牌意味着知道何时全力以赴，何时做出选择。”

blocks.html_en: • Read the full story: 'It wasn't a decision made in a rush': OnePlus explains why it’s just quit the US and Europe — and answers our 5 biggest questions about what it means

sentences.en: Read the full story: 'It wasn't a decision made in a rush': OnePlus explains why it’s just quit the US and Europe — and answers our 5 biggest questions about what it means
sentences.zh: 阅读全文：“这不是仓促做出的决定”：OnePlus 解释了为何退出美国和欧洲市场 - 并回答了我们关于其含义的 5 个最大问题

blocks.html_en: Follow TechRadar on Google News and add us as a preferred source to get our expert news, reviews, and opinion in your feeds.

sentences.en: Follow TechRadar on Google News and add us as a preferred source to get our expert news, reviews, and opinion in your feeds.
sentences.zh: 在 Google 新闻上关注 TechRadar，并将我们添加为首选来源，以便在您的 Feed 中获取我们的专家新闻、评论和意见。

blocks.html_en: Dave is a freelance tech journalist who has been writing about gadgets, apps and the web for more than two decades. Based out of Stockport, England, on TechRadar you'll find him covering news, features and reviews, particularly for phones, tablets and wearables. Working to ensure our breaking news coverage is the best in the business over weekends, David also has bylines at Gizmodo, T3, PopSci and a few other places besides, as well as being many years editing the likes of PC Explorer and The Hardware Handbook.

sentences.en: Dave is a freelance tech journalist who has been writing about gadgets, apps and the web for more than two decades.
sentences.zh: Dave 是一名自由科技记者，二十多年来一直致力于撰写有关小工具、应用程序和网络的文章。

sentences.en: Based out of Stockport, England, on TechRadar you'll find him covering news, features and reviews, particularly for phones, tablets and wearables.
sentences.zh: 他居住在英国斯托克波特，在 TechRadar 上您会发现他报道新闻、专题和评论，尤其是手机、平板电脑和可穿戴设备方面的新闻、专题和评论。

sentences.en: Working to ensure our breaking news coverage is the best in the business over weekends, David also has bylines at Gizmodo, T3, PopSci and a few other places besides, as well as being many years editing the likes of PC Explorer and The Hardware Handbook.
sentences.zh: 为了确保我们周末的突发新闻报道是业内最好的，David 还在 Gizmodo、T3、PopSci 和其他一些地方发表署名，并多年来编辑 PC Explorer 和 The Hardware Handbook 等书籍。

content_html_zh:
TechRadar 每周都会发布大量技术故事 - 如果您能够跟上所有这些故事，那将是一个非常令人印象深刻的壮举，而其他一切都在发生（有世界杯吗？）。

本次 ICYMI（以防万一您错过了）综述的目的是帮助您快速了解科技领域最重大的新闻和最重要的头条新闻。 这些是过去 7 天最重要的文章。

我们有有关 Apple、OpenAI、OnePlus、大众和 Microsoft 的新闻，还有三星的幕后花絮和重要的 GoPro 评论 - 所以让我们深入了解一下。

7. 大众汽车推出世界上技术最先进的电动自行车

大众汽车有一款全新的电动自行车值得炫耀：新的 Smart eBike 系列是与 n+ 合作开发的，在技术和安全功能上都表现出色。 您会在这里找到雷达辅助交通监控以及高清后视摄像头，因此当您踩踏板（或不踩踏板）时，您将更好地了解周围的情况。

还有一个扩展的安全生态系统，一个可选的智能头盔，用于同步转向信号并使它们更加明显，以及一副智能眼镜，这可能是整个套件中最前沿的部分。 您可以使用智能规格在需要时将旅程信息和导航说明呈现在您的眼前。

  • 阅读全文：大众汽车推出配备全球首款集成后视摄像头和智能眼镜的创新电动自行车

6. 我们评测了 GoPro 的高级运动摄像机

GoPro 的新款 Mission 1 Pro 更加雄心勃勃，这是一款旗舰运动相机，在经典外形的基础上添加了一些高级功能。 我们的高级撰稿人 Hamish Hector 对该相机进行了彻底的 TechRadar 测试，并对 Mission 1 Pro 所提供的几乎所有功能印象深刻。

Mission 1 Pro 的高分辨率视频录制、录制模式选择以及经过调整的设计选择受到了特别赞扬，这些都使 Mission 1 Pro 与其前代产品有所不同。 单击查看高级相机在照片和视频性能方面的功能，并了解它是否适​​合您的升级。

订阅突发新闻、评论、观点、顶级技术交易等。

  • 阅读全文：Mission 1 Pro 不仅仅是 GoPro 的旗舰运动相机，它还是一款出色的全能度假相机，配有傻瓜相机 - 我只是希望它能更便宜

5. 我们走进了三星显示器的秘密实验室

三星手机和平板电脑以其屏幕质量而闻名，因此当我们受邀参观三星显示器工厂的幕后时，我们当然抓住了这个机会。 这是制造和测试当前显示器的地方，也是测试下一代型号的地方（尽管遗憾的是我们没有看到 Galaxy Z Fold 8）。

从先进的压力测试到即将推出的内置视错觉显示器，巡演中有很多东西值得一看，通读我们的文章是您自己实际访问的下一个最佳选择。 当然，我们还不得不向三星显示器代表询问有关传闻中的 iPhone Fold 的问题，但他们似乎并不太担心竞争对手......

  • 阅读全文：三星显示器公司的秘密实验室内部，该公司在那里构建下一代显示器并对其进行压力测试，并表示已为苹果推出可折叠显示器做好了准备：“我们是认真的，我们喜欢其他公司加入这个市场”

4. iOS 27 公测版随新 Siri 一起登陆

即将推出的 iOS 27 软件更新给 iPhone 用户带来了很多期待，尤其是新的和改进的 Siri AI 应用程序（或有效的 Siri 2.0）。 本周，公共测试版发布，这意味着任何想要的人都可以尽早尝试新功能——假设他们不介意在此过程中忍受一些错误或随机崩溃。

无论您是运行测试版的老手，还是考虑第一次尝试，我们的指南都会解释如何在手机上下载并安装 iOS 27。 我们还重点介绍了您应该首先测试的三个新功能，包括改进的照片编辑工具，该工具使用一点人工智能魔法使您的照片看起来比以往更好。

  • 阅读全文：如何下载 iOS 27 公开测试版 — 以及首先尝试的 3 个新功能

3. Windows 11 有了重大更新

虽然在此过程中出现了一些失误，但总的来说，微软今年在改进 Windows 11 方面进展顺利。 最新的 7 月更新延续了这一趋势，如果您是桌面操作系统的用户，那么您应该感到高兴：有一些智能的新功能，以及一些重要的错误修复。

这次最引人注目的升级之一是我们等待已久的功能：Windows 11 更新的适当暂停功能，因此如果您不想立即安装最新补丁，您不会觉得自己被催促尽快应用它们。 我们已经了解了该功能如何工作的详细信息，以及这次的其他新内容。

  • 阅读全文：新的 Windows 11 更新是一项重大更新 - 这是我最喜欢的 4 个功能，包括无限期暂停更新的功能

2. 苹果 vs OpenAI 的重磅诉讼落下

公平地说，苹果和 OpenAI 的关系不像以前那么好了，员工被挖走，机密信息被盗…… 据称。 苹果现已对 OpenAI 提起诉讼，声称 ChatGPT 开发商通过前苹果员工窃取了商业机密，该案可能会产生严重的长期影响。

根据法院和法官的裁决，这可能会影响 OpenAI 推出硬件设备的新计划，并影响苹果开发其软件的方式——请记住，在撰写本文时，ChatGPT 仍然嵌入在 Siri 中。 在接下来的几个月里，我们可能会听到更多有关这个令人震惊的案件的消息。

  • 阅读全文：Apple 与 OpenAI 诉讼 — 8 项爆炸性指控以及这场法律战争可能如何改变你的下一部 iPhone

1. OnePlus正式退出美国和欧洲

OnePlus 终于没路了——至少在美国和欧洲是这样。 母公司 Oppo 已决定该品牌将退出这些市场，这意味着世界上很大一部分地区将错过一些出色的手机。 近年来，我们最喜欢的一些手机都来自 OnePlus，但从现在开始，可用性将更加有限。

如果您已经在美国或欧洲拥有 OnePlus 设备，那么您将继续获得支持和软件更新，但不会发布任何新手机。 “这并不是一个仓促做出的决定，”Oppo 的陈爽在一份简报中解释道。 “成为一个负责任的品牌意味着知道何时全力以赴，何时做出选择。”

  • 阅读全文：“这不是仓促做出的决定”：OnePlus 解释了为何退出美国和欧洲市场 - 并回答了我们关于其含义的 5 个最大问题

在 Google 新闻上关注 TechRadar，并将我们添加为首选来源，以便在您的 Feed 中获取我们的专家新闻、评论和意见。

Dave 是一名自由科技记者，二十多年来一直致力于撰写有关小工具、应用程序和网络的文章。 他居住在英国斯托克波特，在 TechRadar 上您会发现他报道新闻、专题和评论，尤其是手机、平板电脑和可穿戴设备方面的新闻、专题和评论。 为了确保我们周末的突发新闻报道是业内最好的，David 还在 Gizmodo、T3、PopSci 和其他一些地方发表署名，并多年来编辑 PC Explorer 和 The Hardware Handbook 等书籍。
